headline: Is Eaton’s (ETN) SPAN Bet Quietly Redefining Its AI-Driven Power Management Ambitions?
summary: Eaton recently announced a partnership with SPAN, including a US$75 million investment, to bring smart electrical panels and energy intelligence technology to market for more affordable home electrification and reduced grid strain, with joint solutions expected in the second quarter of 2026. This move extends Eaton’s “Home as a Grid” approach by combining SPAN’s whole-home energy insights with Eaton’s protection hardware and distribution network, aiming to cut construction and retrofit costs...

headline: Eaton and SPAN Establish Strategic Partnership to Transform How Power Is Managed in Homes and Further Enable Affordable Electrification
summary: Partnership tackles grid constraints and rising household energy demands with smart, flexible solutions Gives customers greater control and flexibility for reliable, affordable and future-proof electrification Increases Eaton's expansive residential ...
